boardgame: Eat Zem All: Ze Pack 02 – Nick
description:
Don't panic! Nick suffers from Good Samaritan Syndrome. He wants to save everyone, even from themselves. His role as a self-proclaimed benefactor gives him courage and resilience. It will represent a major challenge for your horde.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Dice Throne Adventures: Unchained (DTA:U) is an expansion that adds a new boss, new minions, new loot cards, and new game modes to Dice Throne Adventures.

Exploration, gold, treasure, upgrades, minions, boss battles, and even a shopkeeper named Rosella? Welcome to the latest addition to the Dice Throne universe!

Dice Throne Adventures (DTA) is a cooperative expansion that allows up to 4 players to use the heroes you already own in a brand new way. Work together over a series of game nights to travel from the Crimson Sands all the way to the Mad King's throne room. Your heroes will gain permanent deck upgrades with each session, but don't become overconfident. The King hasn't lost a single battle in a thousand years and he's eager for a real challenge.

Requires Season 1, Season 2, Marvel, X-men, Deadpool, or Outcast characters to play.

Dice Throne Adventures: Unchained is NOT STANDALONE and requires Dice Throne Adventures.

Agile Unicorn is a competitive, tactical card game that pokes fun at the absurdities of the agile start-up world with a wink. In this competitive tactical game, you become a legendary CEO by winning the most valuable victory point features and leading your IT startup to hyped unicorn status.

Starting with 3 employees, you decide each round which employee(s) you use to obtain a card - this can be a feature (victory points), incentive (booster) or another employee.

Each employee gives the player 1-3 dice, depending on their level. After each player has decided which employees to deploy, you can use event cards to make things even more difficult for someone. Then the dice are rolled. Whoever rolls the best total value receives the card.

The first player to reach 32 points wins.

Players create a 30-card deck from the available factions: Authority, Asylum, Outlander, Havoc, and Sect 13, with the option of using neutral Mercenary cards. A second deck of ten Dreamplanes provides the energy and dedication points used to pay for cards. Each player gets a 2x4 playmat upon which their cards are placed, alternating between playing Dreamshapes to attack and Warps and Distorts to counter damage and proved buffs. The goal is to reduce an opponent's Morale to zero, both beginning with a count of fifty.

Mythic Warzone: A Sci-Fi Fantasy Role-Playing Card Game - Dive into the immersive world of Mythic Warzone, where Sci-Fi meets Fantasy in a strategic card game.  With 7 pre-built decks, you and your friends or family will embark on thrilling adventures and epic battles in every game session.

Mythic Warzone offers a flexible experience with game lengths ranging from just 5 minutes for quick duels to 45 minutes for more strategic showdowns. Each player controls their own 40-card deck, allowing for unique strategies and endless replayability. With a total of 280 cards, the possibilities are limitless!  The game comes with 7 player mats to track health points, along with 50 tokens to enhance gameplay and maintain the flow of the action.

This is a fighting game, where the goal is to reduce your opponents health to zero to win the game. Players use the spells and items in the card decks to win their fights.

—description from the publisher

Squishy Grip is a quick and easy to learn friendship destroyer game where You, a determined plushie, must either join forces with or sabotage 1-5 other players in a daring bid to escape the claw machine.

Only one plushie can make it out in time.

Players have the option of 6 plushies to play as, each with their own unique power to cater to their individual playing style. You will have to overcome several obstacles on your way to raise enough stuffing to withstand the final boss — The Claw.

Squishy Grip is a game where chance and strategy are interwoven. Can you overcome luck with planning and negotiation?


     Play as 1 of 6 plushies on a board where your fate can be impacted with a coin flip or dice roll.
     Speed run the win or take your time to play it safe.
     Play cards against your fellow plushies in a bid to craft partnerships or leave them in the dust.
     Fight mini-bosses and find the best way to travel around the board through rounds that are fresh and exciting each time.


—description from the designer

Crumbling Kingdom is a party game of deceit and investigation for 5-10 players. Each player will be randomly assigned a secret loyalty card at the beginning of the game. They will either be on the side of the Heroes or the Villains.

Heroes will try to bring peace to the kingdom, while the Villains will try to throw the kingdom into chaos. players will vote on Decree cards that will save the kingdom, or destroy it!

Who will you trust? Only you can determine where others loyalties lie!

In this game you try to hit the right amount of hits indicated on the flag card. If you have the right amount you win this round and everyone who doesnt reach it gets a golfball. Who at the end has the leaast golfballs winns the game.
Its a 2-6 player game wich is played in roughly 15 minutes.

You and a handful of strangers find yourself at the feet of a great minotaur who seems unsympathetic to your current plight.   The Minotaur finally speaks.   They have misplaced a multitude of objects and artifacts, scattered along the mazes unforgiving pathways.  They offer you a way to escape these damp corridors  by collecting and returning a number of these relics.   The first to make it back to the minotaur with all of their assigned treasures,  will have paid their toll and be transported back to the land of the living.   The rest of you will exist eternally trapped in the maze with the beast.

This is a maze puzzler card game.  With each player's turn,  the maze grows in length by one tile.  Player's race to collect all of their objective cards and return to the starting point in order to win and be released from the maze.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Tales From the Skald: Legends of Aramyth
description:
Welcome, Brave Adventurer, to Tales From the Skald: Legends of Aramyth!

Your journey into the realm of Aramyth is about to begin. Embark into a world filled with ancient magic, formidable foes, and untold treasures waiting to be discovered. Here, the echoes of forgotten gods linger in the winds, kingdoms rise and fall, and the spark of heroism lies within every soul daring enough to step forward.

As you take your first steps into this vast and wondrous world, know that you are more than just a player. You are a storyteller, a legend in the making. Every choice you make, every battle you fight, and every mystery you unravel will shape the fate of Aramyth and carve your name into the annals of history.

Here, the impossible becomes possible. You may find yourself standing shoulder to shoulder with sentient golems, conversing with ancient spirits, or unraveling the cosmos' secrets. Whether you choose to be a warrior, a mage, a rogue, or something more unique, your adventure is yours to create.

This game is more than just a test of strength and strategy. It explores your imagination. It's about forging bonds with fellow adventurers, overcoming challenges together, and weaving tales of heroism that will be remembered long after the dice have stopped rolling.

So gather your courage, sharpen your wits, and prepare for the adventure of a lifetime. The world of Aramyth awaits, filled with wonders and dangers beyond your wildest dreams. You are the hero of this story, and your legend begins now.

Welcome to Tales From the Skald: Legends of Aramyth—where every journey is epic, and every adventurer leaves a mark on the world.

May the Skalds sing of your deeds for generations to come!

—description from the designer
family: Versions & Editions: Board Game Versions of Role-Playing Games

description:
Scenic Route: Tennessee is a deck-building nostalgic road trip through the great state of Tennessee. Players will visit iconic historical sites and beautiful natural wonders as they traverse the many interstates, highways, and scenic routes of the cities and countryside. But be careful, the cities can quickly become loaded with traffic making it very frustrating to get where they are going. Featuring places to stop along the way, refuel their gas tanks, and even road hazards, this family strategy game will bring nostalgic feelings of the great American family road trip.

—description from the designer

Legends of the Arena is a fast-paced brawling board game for 2–6 players (1-6 with solo expansion), inspired by fighting games like Super Smash Bros. Choose your Legend, read your opponents, and knock them out of the Arena to win!


     Competitive and strategic, but quick to learn
     Simultaneous play keeps the action moving
     8 Unique Legends with distinct moves & ultimates
     One minute setup with a compact, table-friendly footprint
     Quick to play, only 8 minutes per player
     Play 1v1, 2v2, 3v3, or free-for-all


Enter the Arena as a unique Legend, armed with powerful abilities. Coordinate your skills to build a strategy and anticipate your opponents’ moves. Select three action cards, reveal them simultaneously to execute your plan, then repeat. No lead is safe, and no comeback is impossible!

—description from the publisher
family: Players: Games with expansions that add solo play

description: No Ordinary Deck of Cards… THREE Extraordinary Games of Strategy! The ultimate game of trump now includes 3 different levels of strategy! Classic WIZARD Card Game and its variations have been enjoyed by millions of players around the world. WIZARD OMNIBUS introduces two new variations: WIZARD MAGIC and WIZARD CAMELOT. All three games follow classic Wizard’s gameplay where the game is won by accurately bidding. Winning tricks is the easy part; the challenge is to predict the exact number of tricks you will take. WIZARD MAGIC adds one rule that maintains the simplicity of the original game yet provides a variety of exciting new strategies. WIZARD CAMELOT replaces the deuces with four new cards to challenge the skill of even the most advanced players.

Promotional Action card originally handed out at Gen Con 2024.

Text says:
"High five another player when you play this card."
Add goalkeepers to the Magic Eleven game. Three cards and a small rulesheet.

boardgame: Dossiers Criminels: Mystère dans la Vallée des Rois
description:
A collaborative game made in France!
Play as a detective: The body of a woman who died only a few days ago is discovered during the opening of a pharaonic tomb sealed for millennia.

A complete criminal file: contains testimonies, forensic analyses, press articles, crime scene photos crime scene photos, audio content...

Escape game mechanics: Solve puzzles to unlock 4 envelopes containing additional evidence.
Detective 2.0 : Internet access is required in order to access the Dark Web, hack into an email box and open cubicles. Also, several levels of clues are available on the site so you don't get stuck.
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

boardgame: Dossiers Criminels: Le Secret des Yakuzas
description:
A collaborative game made in France!
Play as a detective: Akira Fukada, legendary leader of the Fukada Kai yakuza clan, is found dead after a dizzying fall. There's an urgent need to find the culprit, before the yakuza take justice into their own hands and Tokyo is torn apart by their confrontations.
A complete criminal file containing all the elements needed to solve the murder.
Escape game mechanics: Solve puzzles to unlock 4 envelopes containing additional evidence.
Detective 2.0 : Internet access is required in order to unlock several databases. Also, several levels of clues are available on the site so you don't get stuck.
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
Principati Duello is a handcrafted strategy board game focused on territory control and player interaction.

Designed and produced in small series using 3D printing, each copy is unique.

Players must carefully plan their expansion, manage resources, and influence their opponent’s decisions.

The game emphasizes strategic placement, long-term planning, and the ability to disrupt your opponent’s strategy.

In What The Ghost?!, players become paranormal investigators, bravely facing eerie encounters with ghosts, cursed artifacts, and haunted locations. Working together, players unravel mysteries, hunt down spirits, and perform intense exorcisms to cleanse sites of supernatural disturbances.

Each player selects a unique character, bringing specialized skills to the team, from an exorcist with occult knowledge to a gadget expert and a seasoned ghost hunter. Armed with the versatile EctoBoy—a multifunctional device combining all essential ghost-hunting tools—players investigate paranormal events, gather crucial clues, locate cursed objects, and prepare for the final showdown with the ghost.

With high replayability, What The Ghost?! offers countless combinations of ghostly encounters and cursed items. Random events, shifting haunted rooms, and unpredictable spirit behavior ensure that no two games are alike. As each round progresses, the difficulty increases, testing the players' teamwork, strategy, and nerve.

Ideal for fans of ghost stories, horror, and cooperative games, What The Ghost?! blends suspense, strategy, and immersive storytelling to create a chilling board game experience. Are you ready to face the unknown?

—description from the designer

The Next Gen expansion introduces next-generation technologies such as the Giga Transporter and Ionic Batteries. These new cards open up unprecedented strategic possibilities, turning the basic game's combos on their head. 
Nothing will ever be the same again: these new technologies will give you a decisive advantage in the race for Eternitium.

New mechanics: these cards add interaction by slowing down your opponents, a new way to improve your deck and even stop-or-go. They add a new dimension of replayability and strategy, even for seasoned players.

—description from the publisher

Tabletop, head-to-head pinball for 2 players--a competitive sprint to ten points where each player needs to not only outscore their opponent but navigate tricky bumpers across the field (or end up scoring against themselves!)

A solo game where the player plays as one of three races and one of three classes. They are given a quest to complete in a matter of days and must defend themselves from what lurks in the shadows. Players make noise throughout the day which draws the attention of monsters at night. Rolling and allocating dice to activate abilities and gain buffs to aid in the players venture.

In Inawapa, you go around the board building weapons and shelters, capturing and eating prey, and sometimes fighting other players. You can starve to death, be killed by predators, die in a natural disaster, or be snuffed out by another player. The object of the game is to survive while other players are dying. There’s only one survivor, and the last one standing wins.

boardgame: Rally Point Volume 20: The Italian Army in WWII
description:
Rally Point Volume 20: The Italian Army in World War II is a set of 10 all new scenarios featuring the Italian Army. Each scenario was handmade and play-tested to the high standard players expect from the Tampa ASL Group’s fine craftsmen. Each scenario is presented in the Schwerpunkt easy-to-read format on high-quality card stock.

RPT191 Lazarus Wilson – ADADLE, Somaliland, 15 August 1940: Elements of the Italian 3rd Blackshirt Battalion and the 3rd Bande of Native Troops attack to clear the Somaliland Camel Corps from its hilltop trench line. Captain Eric Charles Twelves Wilson received a Victoria Cross for his leadership in this 5.5 turn desert thriller set on boards 28, 30 and 31.

RPT192 Espirito Inaspettato – SPI KAMARATE, Northwest of Ballaban, Albania, 22 January 1941: The Greek 7th Regiment, 1st Division is conducting a double envelopment attack to secure an Albanian hamlet defended by elements of the 6th Alpini Regiment, 2nd Divisione Alpine (Tridentina) with a mountain howitzer and an anti-tank gun. This 6.5 turn all infantry action has plenty of movement for both sides and is set on board 15a.

RPT193 The Daring Ones – Hill 731, Albania, 19 March 1941: Elements of the Italian Siena and Centauro Divisions conduct their eighteenth attack to destroy Greek infantry of the 6th Division who are tenaciously defending their Hill 731 trench line. This 5-turn tournament scenario features lots of exciting Hand-to-Hand Combat action on board 78.

RPT194 Maranzani’s Mission – SERAFIMOVICH, Volgograd Oblast, Russia, 1 August 1942: Elements of the Italian 3rd Divisione Celere is attacking with twenty squads, light tanks, and motorcycles to clear the Russian 197th Infantry Division from its Don River bridgehead. This 5.5 turn, medium-sized scenario, features a Yeti-like appearance of Lend-Lease Lee tanks being stalked by Italians with Molotov Cocktails and a flamethrower is set on boards 3a, 6a and 86a.

RPT195 Folgore Consolidated - DEIR ALINDA, Egypt, 31 August 1942: An Infantry Company of the 2nd New Zealand Division with supporting Valentine tanks and carriers are attacking to clear nine elite squads of the 185th Divisione Paracadutisti (Folgore) from their sangars and foxholes on a hillock. Italian OBA, flamethrowers and Molotov Cocktails will test your Kiwi nerve in this 5-turn desert action set on boards 26, 27 and 28.

RPT196 Addio Arriete - BIR EL ABD, Egypt, 5 November 1942: Elements of the British 10th Armoured Division are attacking with truck-mounted infantry, Crusader tanks and carriers to destroy a retreating company of Bersaglieri when they are suddenly counterattacked by eleven M13/40 tanks from the 132ª Divisione Corazzata "Ariete". This is 6 turn, fast-moving, armored melee set on boards 26, 27, 28, 29, 30 and 31 that is as exciting as desert tank fighting gets.

RPT197 Centaro and Sand – Near ANTELAT, Libya, 18 November 1942: Here’s an Italian column of armored cars, and tanks and trucks and rigs of every size from the 131st Armored Division (Centauro) in a meeting engagement at an escarpment bristling with Desert Rats’ Hussars in armored cars and carriers of nearly every flavor known to Monty. Soon, the guns will roar and smoke will fill the skies. Mike Augustine designed this medium-sized, 5-turn, carburetor clogging desert clash set on boards 25e and 26 that is an instant classic. Be sure to wear your dust goggles when you play this one.

RPT198 Ordered Not to Reply – FONDOUK EL AOUAREB, Tunisia, 9 April 1943: Elements of the 34th Infantry Division and supporting M-3 Lee tanks attack to control level four hill hexes defended by an assortment of German, Italian and Native squads with six self-propelled guns and Stuka air support. Mike Augustine designed this large, but fast-playing 5.5 turn scenario that is set on boards 25, 31, 81 and 83.

RPT199 Gruppo Tattico Ronco – FLORIDIA, Sicily, 11 July 1943: On D+1 of Operation Husky twenty-four Italian squads from 54th Divisione di Fanteria (Napoli) counterattack supported by ten MR35(f) tanks to recapture a village defended by fifteen 2nd Battalion Cameronians (Scottish Rifles) squads and three County of London Yeomanry (Sharpshooters) tanks. This medium-sized, 6 turn scenario set on boards 11a, 85 and 86, features an exciting and rare opportunity to test your Italian tank crews’ ability to effectively employ obsolete French tanks against Shermans.

RPT200 Red Hot Hannibal – North of Canicatti, Sicily, 12 July 1943: Elements of the American 2nd Armored Division are attacking with twelve squads, five Shermans and two halftracks to clear a village and the surrounding high ground of eleven German and Italian squads from the Bersaglieri Reggimento 177 (Gruppo Venturi) and Kampfgruppe Fullriede that are supported by an Italian 90mm self-propelled tank destroyer. This 5.5 turn, medium sized scenario is set on boards 87 and 88 has lots of movement and tense, nail biting action.

This is a card game with 31 cards, each representing a memory from a day in July 1986. Players aim to play the most consecutive numbered cards in front of them, helping them gradually recall memories from those days.
On a player's turn, they must choose one of these actions:

Draw a card from the deck, or
Play a card in front of them and resolve any card effects (if any). The number on the played card must be higher than the previously played cards.

The game ends when either a player plays the July 31st card or when the deck runs out of cards.

—description from the designer

boardgame: 롱 샷: 다이스 게임 미니 확장 5종 (Longshot: Five Mini-Expansions)
description:
This compilation includes five expansions for Long Shot: The Dice Game:
Track Events Mini-Expansion
Horse Set 4 (Boot) Mini-Expansion
Horse Set 5 (Hot Dog) Mini-Expansion
Horse Set 6 (Jockey) Mini Expansion
Horse Set 7 (Trophy) Mini Expansion

Suit and Tie is a game where you strategically build your hand and play combinations until you reduce the style points of all other players, called designers.

Suit and Tie is ideal for 2-5 designers, and the goal of the game is to reduce the Style points of every other Designer until they are "out of fashion" and you are the only one with Style points left, making you the most fashionable for that round.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
Cosechas is a card game that consists of collecting fruits and vegetables that must generate a pattern, each player is a farmer and from the beginning of the game has an order in which they must collect their food for their harvest to work, these foods have four colors (green, red, yellow and orange) and the collection patterns of each player are different, the first player to complete their harvest wins.

—description from the publisher

Cosechas es un juego de cartas que consiste en la recolección de frutas y verduras que deben generar un patrón, cada jugador es un campesino y desde el inicio del juego tiene un orden en el que debe recolectar sus alimentos para que su cosecha funcione, estos alimentos tienen cuatro colores (verde, rojo, amarillo y anaranjado) y los patrones de recolección de cada jugador son diferentes, ganará el primer jugador que complete su cosecha.

—description from the publisher (translated)

boardgame: ビンゴカードを使った新しいゲーム (A New Game Using Bingo Cards)
description:
The game comes with the components to play to games using standard 75-ball bingo cards.

One game is a trick-taking game, where the players are trying to complete certain patterns on their bingo boards, but will likely lose points for each trick they win. Players "must follow" the column of the lead player's selection, etc.

The other game is a "batting" game, where the players will choose numbers at the same time, and if you choose the same as another player, those values are removed from consideration of any resolution. In this game, there are certain rule cards on the table, that show the row or column from which players will select this round, what the goal is (e.g. highest value, largest different between tens and ones digit), and how many points will be earned.
publishers: あーきっと.ゲームズ (Archit Games)

description: Foodles is a party game where players draw unusual, food-inspired drawing based on prompts from cards.  A judge selects their favorite drawing from all the players and that player gets to keep the prompt card.  The player with the most cards at the end of the game wins.

Chronofiends!! is a cooperative sci-fi board game set on a space station trapped in a time loop, where players must navigate through chaotic environments filled with danger and excitement. The Hearthseekers, a fanatical group erased from history due to their reckless time experiments, have broken the flow of time, causing the station to loop in time endlessly. They’ve kidnapped and experimented on aliens from across the galaxy, who are now also loose and throwing the station into chaos. Meanwhile, the extradimensional Chronofiends — entities that consume paradoxes and everything caught within them—are slowly devouring the time loop, creating a tense race against time.

In Chronofiends!!, players explore the station, searching for essential items and room rewards needed to close the time paradox and escape before they’re erased. Each character possesses unique abilities that alter time and space, enabling them to interact differently with obstacles, allies, and the hostile aliens roaming the station. The game's mechanics emphasize resource and time management, as players take actions by moving through connected rooms, resolving obstacles, and accumulating skill points that enhance their abilities. However, every encounter with a Chronofiend reduces the available time, accelerating the station’s collapse.

Adding to the tension, Chronofiends!! incorporates a countdown mechanic via the Time Track, where each player’s remaining actions are limited. If players can navigate through the challenging rooms, gather scenario-specific items, and use their skills effectively, they have a chance to fix the paradox and escape. But if the loop resets or time runs out, everything they've achieved unravels, and they must start anew with only the knowledge they’ve gained in prior attempts. This collapsing cycle tests teamwork, strategy, and quick adaptation. This is a pure cooperative game, where all the players win, or they all lose.

—description from the designer

Le Petit Composteur is a board game, 100% made in France, for children from 5 years which raises awareness of composting and bio-waste recovery

The goal of the game? Be the first to get rid of all your cards by making sure you compost the bio-waste!

Playing the game Le Petit Composteur will help you get familiar with bio-waste, whether it is green (wet) or brown (dry). The game’s engine, meanwhile, is based on the practice of composting by alternating the corresponding cards in a miniature compost bin.

However, cards also hide recyclable waste and other non-recyclable waste... This is the moment when we start laughing. In order to get rid of it, the die, with all its surprises, will be your best ally, or not... !

With the small composter, the more a waste has a harmful ecological impact, the more difficult it is for the player to get rid of it.

Welcome to the grand beach, where the 'Golden Clam' or 'Palourde d'Or'  competition is underway! The tide is low, the sun is shining—perfect conditions for clamming!

All the fishers are gathered with a single goal: to find and collect as many clams as possible before the tide rises.

On their turn, each fisher flips two cards to find pairs and collect clams.  But beware! The beach is full of surprises. Beyond watching the tide, you’ll have to deal with other beach residents: thieving crabs, speedy seagulls, and curious shrimp, all eager to disrupt your catch.

The fisher who can dodge these obstacles and gather the most clams before the tide comes in will win the 'Golden Clam,' the ultimate symbol of pride for any fisher.

A christmas crime game

     Investigate different clues
     Check alibis and motives
     Analyze sound recordings and videos
     Research online


You receive a multitude of documents with further information about different websites and other resources that are relevant to solving the case. You play either alone or together as a team and have to check alibis and deduce logically. Use all available accessories - even cellphones are allowed.

Das Städtchen Frostheim steht vor einem Rätsel: Der geschmückte Weihnachtsbaum wurde vom Markt-platz gestohlen. Riesige Fußspuren führen durch den Schnee in den nahe gelegenen Wald, ein tiefes, unheimliches Grollen wurde gehört und eine geheimnisvoll leuchtende Eiskugel gesichtet. Ist Ataruk das Monster aus dem Eis erwacht? Oder geht in Frostheim etwas ganz anderes vor sich?

Alzuhra lets you play a role-playing game instantly and without any preparation, using mechanics that are accessible to everyone. The story is split into 17 Nights.

Before each Night, one of the players play a different role: Scheherazade. With the help of the story easel, she can:


    Read the introduction and the first events of the Night.
    Find the inspiration to react to the heroes' responses and the results of the dice to create new events.
    Choose the conclusion of the Night.


As a hero, describe your own ideas for solving the adventures created by Scheherazade. You can use your character's painting to:


    Find an object that can help you in your actions.
    Get an extra dice if the chosen object convinces Scheherazade.
    Roll 2 or 3 dices and get at least one green symbol to succeed.


At the end of each night you can pause the game or continue. You can also change who is Scheherazade, which will change your group of merchants. Finally, the choices you make and the conclusions you draw from your adventures will have impact on your next Nights.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Skyrockets: Festival of Fire – P1 Playing with Matches Promo Card
description:
Promo Card "Spiel mit dem Feuerzeug" for Skyrockets.

It says (translated to English):
Reveal the top card from the supply during game preparation. That is the common discard pile.
In your turn, you MUST play 1 card which has at least 1 color of the top card of the discard pile. If you cannot to that, discard 1 card instead. Put the played/discarded card on the common discard pile.

Part of the Catan Geographies series. This map has rules for 3-4 players, as well as 5-6 players. It is a very limited release, available only in Portuguese. It was included in a few Catan boxes in 2020, 2022.

The map depicts Portugal. Pieces and cards from the original Catan game are needed.

In order to win 12-13 victory points are required (depending on how many players participate).

Santorini: Soaring over Olympus contains 17 characters:

     Aeolus
     Aloadae
     Boreas
     Daedalus
     Eirene
     Europa & Talus
     Gryphus
