description:
Brutal Space is a starship combat game based on the Brutality game system. Ships are made up of 1 to 4. There are three levels of ship design — Simple, Moderate, and Advanced — in order to learn the game in a structured manner. The game is played on a 3 foot by 3 foot area.

Brutal Space can be played in co-op, versus, and solo modes. It comes with a campaign system and a system for integrating spaceship fleet battles with ground combat using Brutality.

Texas Demons is a must-follow trick-taker played with dominoes (or domino playing cards). It combines the trick-taking rules from  Texas 42, a traditional domino trick-taker, with a variation on the scoring system from Yokai Septet, a commercial card game designed by Yio & Muneyuki Yokouchi and published by Ninja Star Games. (Thanks to both designers and the publisher for permitting me to share these rules.)

The objective is to capture five Demons before you take too many tricks. Demons are double dominoes – or doubles – where the top and bottom numbers are the same (for example, 3-3 is a Demon).

—description from the designer

Introduction:Duile (from Irish: duille, meaning "leaf") is an annihilation game for two players: Dark green and Light green. It is played on the hexes (cells) of an initially empty hexagonal board. The recommended size is 7 cells per side, but boards of 5 to 9 cells are also valid. Each player has access to a sufficient supply of stones of their own color.

				
				
					Definitions:
     A tree is a maximal set of stones of the same color connected to each other. A single stone is also a tree.
     A leaf is a stone adjacent to only one friendly stone.
     The size of a tree is the number of stones it contains.
     A stagnant tree is a tree that cannot increase its size.


				
				
					Turns:Dark plays first, and then turns alternate. On your turn, perform the following actions in order:


     Place a stone of your color on an empty cell adjacent to, at most, three friendly groups that are not adjacent to each other.
     Remove all enemy trees adjacent to a stagnant tree of any color if those trees have an equal or smaller number of leaves than the stagnant tree.


At the end of your turn, the board position must be different from the board position at the end of your previous turn.

				
				
					End of the game:The last player with stones remaining on the board wins. If at the end of a turn the board position is identical to any of the previous ones, with the same player to move, the game ends in a draw. This is possible in theory, but will likely require player cooperation.

If a move recreates any previous board position at the end of the turn with the same player in charge, the game ends in a draw.

To balance the game, before starting, the first player places a dark stone on an empty cell, and the second player chooses a side. This balancing method is called the pie rule.

				
				
					Variant:Capture can only be performed by the tree that cannot increase its number of leaves.

—description from the publisher

Did I Win? is a trivia game with a with a twist. Each round one player is the reader and reads a trivia question from a card. All other players write an answer on their paper. When everyone is finished each player announces their answer. Then the players use the "Yes or No" card to signal if their answer is the one closest to the correct answer. The player who was closest gets a point and the players who were correct in their "Yes or No" answer get a point. The game continues until all players have been the reader. The winner is the player with the most points after a predetermined number of rounds.

—description from the publisher

A 2 player duel set in the world of Goddess of Victory: NIKKE.

Both players create a team of 3 NIKKEs and face off against each other in a tactical, card-driven and acrylic stand powered duel.

With a variety of maps, and new characters releasing intermittingly mix and match the varieties of weapons to build a winning team.

As your characters take damage, they deal more damage until they enter a powerful Burst state.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description: Baldr (the god of spring and light) special ability is activated at the end of the game: if a player has all his/her vikings in single controlled region, the points for that region are doubled.
Mímir special ability is to copy the special ability of the opponent. In other words both players will have the same powers during the game (symmetrical confrontation).

boardgame: Forbidden Psalm: The End Times Edition
description:
The trumpets sounded, and came forth the definitive edition of Forbidden Psalm: Miniatures Gaming at the End of the World.

Forbidden Psalm: The End Times Edition is the definitive version of Forbidden Psalm. This edition combines both the Core Book and the expansion In the Footsteps of the Mad Wizard into one bursting-at-the-seams edition of the game.

Forbidden Psalm is a tabletop miniatures game, inspired by and compatible with MÖRK BORG.

Forbidden Psalm is a 28mm miniatures agnostic game. You can use any miniatures you already own that fit the bill or build custom minis for this game (with random tables to help you determine how to build them). Solo Play and Coop rules included. All content is also able to be used in the MÖRK BORG ttrpg.

In Forbidden Psalm you will recruit a warband of 5 greedy souls to undertake Vriprix the Mad Wizards’ bidding. But the Mad Wizard hasn’t just bet on you. You will face rivals before you will seen any of his coin. Hunt ravenous monsters and unearth dangerous relics as you search for the Psalm itself....maybe even help the Mad Wizard locate his misplaced socks.

A game of blood. Metal and death. In Forbidden Psalm your warband is disposable. Its members will suffer injuries, flaws and even unleash horrible magic. But for hardened survivors, a wealth of plunder and experience awaits.

Includes

Solo play. coop and vs modes of play
a 25 scenario long campaign
new art, new lore and more

boardgame: Forbidden Psalm: The Collection of Death Volume 1
description:
The Collection of Death Volume 1 includes previously released zines, freebies, and some new horrors to add to your games of Forbidden Psalm. This Collection requires a copy of any Forbidden
Psalm Core Rule book to play. These Scenarios were designed with Forbidden Psalm in mind, but can be played with The Last War, Dread Nights, Kill Sample Process, and any future version of Forbidden Psalm

​A Collection of expansions for Forbidden Psalm
Including Such Horrors as:
Dead Festival 1 and 2
DeadChurch
Forbidden wilderness
Rotten Bits
and much more.
A copy of Forbidden Psalm is required to play these Scenarios.

over 20 scenarios and new monsters to add to your games, includes new content not  previously available.

A COSMIC HORROR SCIFI EXPANSION FOR ENDLESS HORRORS BETWEEN THE STARS MINIATURES GAME

REQUIRES THE CORE BOOK TO PLAY

Tengoku station is an alternative setting for use with Endless Horrors. You will need a copy of the Corebook to use this one. Instead of setting your game in any other era you can play your Endless Horrors campaign aboard Tengoku station using some or all of the rules, adjustments and background in this book.

In Mecha Jaeger Trick Taker, 3-6 Players will play as Mecha pilots to protect the City from Kaijus. Lead the attacks and take down Kaijus for victory points, but be careful of taking damage. Damage can give you winning points, but take too much and others will think you are reckless and the damage will score you negative points. Whoever has the most points and/or has taken no damage after each hand will win highly revered Star Medals from the city. After any player has 3 Star Medals, the game will end and whoever has the most Star Medals wins Mecha Jaeger Trick Taker.

Mecha Jaeger Trick Taker is a must follow trick taker with multiple twists. Each Kaiju will change what kind of card is winning a trick and also can manipulate gameplay rules. A player will lead the trick and the other players will follow the suit played, but each operator can play into a different color that has already been played before them. There is no starting trump card, but majority of the suits played in a trick will become the trump.

Cards that match the winning suit will damage the Kaiju, but all the other cards played will count as damage to the winning player.

Anything can happen during a hand of Mecha Jaeger Trick Taker! Change the tides to save the City and become the best Mecha Jaeger that the World has ever seen!

—description from the designer

People were born from sperm. The greatest sperm who conquered the path of chaos and found the light of fertilization. And the victor must be one.

Hotsperm is the sperm racing boardgame. The player have to find the way to success the goal with action cards and suitability.
This game can play with 2-6 players use 15 minutes.


            This game contain the explicit contents. Not suitable for under 20.
        
    


—description from the designer

The suns of Malvios are dying. Across the planet, survivors race to glean what hope for the future they can find in the failing light. Fiery Orators, shrewd Stewards, and ponderous Ascetics converge to find the best path forward – and the team they’ll need to follow it.

Converge: Bastions of Tradition includes the fiery Orators, shrewd Stewards, and ponderous Ascetics.

Orators use their rhetoric to Unify the various factions around a common cause, sacrificing a goal for an immediate effect. The Stewards may Promise many things, allowing them to trade future considerations to their opponents for an immediate boost to their faction. The Ascetics seek to Enlighten others, simplifying the goals at hand to provide focus and clarity to one faction.


The story and gameplay of Converge spans across several sets. Each one comes in their own wallet and includes 3 unique 6-card skillsets. All sets can be played individually as standalone games, or players can combine any 3 skillsets from multiple sets to create a new combination.


In Converge, players are competing to build the best team that meets the current goals, though goals and teams can shift with each play. So can control of the powerful artifact which gives an advantage to those who possess it.

Each round, players take turns to play a single card from their hand.

Every card has 2 parts: a character with a skillset, rank and special ability, and a goal, each of which has a star value for fulfilling its requirement. These goals apply to both players while the card is in the central area, with fulfilled goals remaining in play.

Cards can be discarded for their special ability, played to the player’s team to fulfill goals using its suit and value, or as a new shared goal.

At the end of the round, players count their current star value. The player with the most stars gains control of the artifact. If they already had control of the artifact, they win! If no player can secure victory by the time all cards have been played, then the player who holds the artifact is the winner.
family: Players: Games with expansions that add solo play

description: A new gem mine has just been discovered, and dwarves are flocking in from all throughout the region! The goal of the game consists in moving through the mine's galleries in order to collect precious gems, only available in limited amounts. These gems will allow you to purchase cards, used to both build your game engine, and score as many victory points as possible.

The suns of Malvios are dying. Across the planet, survivors race to glean what hope for the future they can find in the failing light. Inventive Engineers, dispassionate Augurs, and hard-working Agrarians converge to find the best path forward – and the team they’ll need to follow it.

Converge: Emissaries of Tomorrow includes the inventive Engineers, dispassionate Augurs, and hard-working Agrarians.

Engineers seek to Innovate, using their formidable technical skills to both draw cards and gain control of the artifact. Augurs Portend the future using trillions of data points fed into complicated algorithms, giving them the knowledge needed to subtly guide Malvios’ current goals. Agrarians harvest and Sow, taking previously discarded cards as part of their preparations.


The story and gameplay of Converge spans across several sets. Each one comes in their own wallet and includes 3 unique 6-card skillsets. All sets can be played individually as standalone games, or players can combine any 3 skillsets from multiple sets to create a new combination.

description:
The suns of Malvios are dying. Across the planet, survivors race to glean what hope for the future they can find in the failing light. Bold Aquanauts, patient Tamers, and reliable Dousers converge to find the best path forward – and the team they’ll need to follow it.

Converge: Champions of Nature includes the bold Aquanauts, patient Tamers, and reliable Dousers.

Aquanauts seek treasure and scientific discoveries below the waves, using their Plunge to move a card in play to the bottom of the deck and replace it with a newly-drawn card. Tamers Train creatures for service roles, adding a newly-drawn card to each faction. Dousers make tough decisions on who to Rescue, giving them the power to swap a discarded card for a goal or faction member.

boardgame: Dungeon Fighter: Second Edition – Promo Hero: King Gilford
description:
Originally promoted as an April Fool in 2023.

"As long as you get your feet wet in my ocean, you'll obey my rules."

Sworn Enemy: Human: If you it, deal +4 damage to a Monster of the Human type. Deal +1 damage do all other types.
Agile Instincts: If you Miss, you don't suffer any damage and deal 2 damage.
Royal Leadership: If you are the Leader and you Hit, deal +3 damage; if you are not the Leader and you Miss, get the Leader Token and heal 1 life point.

Members of the elite Phantasmic Dueling Squad routinely test their skills against each other. Employ your knowledge of counterhexes to prove that you’re the best of the best.

Prove your magical prowess in this strategic bluffing game. Play spells and counterspells against each other in rotating duels. Make use of each spellcasting style’s abilities to turn the tables on your opponents and trick them into making a mistake!

Each turn the Leader picks a Challenger and targets them with a spell. The Challenger plays a counterspell and declares whether it is stronger or weaker than the Leader’s spell. The Leader must decide whether to believe the Challenger or not. The Challenger then reveals their card, resolving any revealed effects. If the Leader guessed correctly, they win the duel and keep the Leader role; otherwise they lose the duel and the Challenger becomes the next Leader. Play until someone wins or loses 3 duels. The first player to win 3 duels is the winner! Otherwise, if any player loses 3 duels, all other players win!
family: Players: Games with expansions that change player count

description:
This PDF includes full army lists and special rules for:

     Holy Roman Empire
     Soviet Union
     Japanese Empire
     USA


The Gaddis Gaming GUARDS V2 rulebook is also required to play.

boardgame: Apropos of Board Games: Table Talk
description:
Apropos: Of Board Games II is a standalone wallet game that tests your knowledge of board games.

To win, players must think of board games that fit increasingly restrictive categories. With each newly flipped card, alternating between Must Have and But No requirements, players must cooperatively find a single example that fits every criteria so far. Get X correct answers for the right to call yourself a true expert!


The new Apropos games will come to the Board Game of the Month Club with a 7 card starter kit, and then a card each month in 2026 until they are complete. The game is playable with as little as 7 cards, but each card adds some more variety.

Apropos: Of Movies II will not only give you a challenge to test your movie knowledge, but can also lead to watching a movie! Over the course of 5 rounds, you’ll increasingly narrow down the possibilities as you name movies that have certain traits but not others, adding a new word (such as Explosions) each round. As a bonus, you can all watch the last movie chosen regardless of whether you make it to the end or not - at the very least, you’ll have narrowed it down to 1-5 movies to go binge-watch on the cold, winter days that are looming right around the corner.


The new Apropos games will come to the Board Game of the Month Club with a 7 card starter kit, and then a card each month in 2026 until they are complete. The game is playable with as little as 7 cards, but each card adds some more variety.

The Eterna Overlord Set expansion contains 18 cards. It introduces a new 6-card map (playable in any game mode) and 12 cards for Eterna. This expansion creates a larger, multi-stage cooperative boss battle for 1–4 players, and was designed to be a much more streamlined experience than Imperator (quicker turns, less of a simulation). Eterna feels like a proper boss as well, unleashing round-altering effects, heavy hitting area-of-effect attacks, and structures that cover landmarks which must be destroyed to progress.


     Eterna Overlord set
     The Vault map set

A wallet compilation of expansions for A Nice Cuppa.


     A Nice Cuppa: Seasonal Stress
     A Nice Cuppa: A Good Book
     A Nice Cuppa: Pets
     A Nice Cuppa: Something Sweet

Intricatus (from the Latin word meaning "entangled") is a captivating solo abstract puzzle. Strategically swap and organize discs in the most efficient way before the clock runs out.

Goal of the game: Successfully organize all the discs into the correct order before time runs out.

The rulebook can to be printed in order to play, there is 1 main board to print and some variations for different challenges, also the player needs to provide the following components or similar to play:

-19 Discs (4 Red, 4 Yellow, 4 Blue, 4 Green and 3 Black)

Disclaimer: the game can receive updates\small adjustments in the future following feedback from the players.

This is the game #08 of the PAC Series.
The PAC Series has the goal to deliver simple, yet engaging games with straightforward mechanics, offering a fun and challenging experience for fans of abstract games.

boardgame: Dungeon Fighter: Second Edition – Promo Hero: Angela, the Windy
description:
Promo Hero for Dungeon Fighter: Second Edition.

"My powers will blow your mind!"

Heal Party: alle Heroes heal 1 life point each.
Agile Instincts: If you Miss, you don't suffer any damage and deal 2 damage.
Storm: If you Hit, you can blow the die once (as long as your lungs allow you) to change its landing position.

A 2-4 player cooperative strategy card game.
This turn-based card game uses a series of abilities, scroll cards, suit powers, and teamwork to defeat the enemies who dwell within your castle.

This game has a dark-fantasy theme that heavily relies on teamwork. If 1 player loses, the whole team loses.

On your turn, you play a card or cards against the enemy. Each of the suits have abilities that allow you to block damage, draw cards, refill the draw pile from the discard pile, or do extra damage.

You must work together, using the suit powers to keep everyone alive, and defeat all the enemies. After defeating each enemy, you get a scroll card that will aid the party in some way. Each player also receives a permanent ability at the start of the game, drawn at random.

Following each players turn, the enemies deal damage to the players, which causes the players to discard cards from their hand. If any player cannot cover the enemy damage, the game is lost. You play until you defeat all enemies, or a player cannot support the damage from the enemy.

—description from the designer

Overwhelmed doctors struggle to treat plague-ridden communities.

Plague Doctors is a 6-card expansion that shuffles into the game, adds the ability to play with a 4th player and is fully compatible with the solo expansions, as well.

Adding in the expansion is easy, just shuffle in the expansion cards to the base game and play.

Strike a balance between using the infected to spread plague within specific communities of skulls and having enough plague doctors to treat all of the infected.

Each infected skull scores for the largest number of adjacent skulls of a single type. Each plague doctor skull scores 5 points provided the number of doctors exactly matches the number of infected.

boardgame: Skulls of Sedlec: Expansion Collection IV
description:
A wallet compilation of expansions for Skulls of Sedlec:


     Plague Doctors
     ...

A wallet compilation of expansions for Hyperstar Run:


     Hyperstar Run: Final Bosses
     Hyperstar Run: Equipment Drop
     Hyperstar Run: Trapped
     Hyperstar Run: Salvage Mode

A wallet compilation of expansions for FantasyForm:


     FantasyForm: Frozen Over
     FantasyForm: Ripped Apart
     FantasyForm: Burned Away

A wallet compilation of expansions for Aqua ROVE:


     Aqua ROVE: Sunken Secrets
     Aqua Rove: Risky Reefs
     Aqua ROVE: Dreadful Depths

How about some more heroes? With more heroes you can get a lot of variety out of your games. You can also play them in solo (either as or against them) and even play 3-4P team games.


     Battlecrest: Andmar – Hero Set
     Battlecrest: Kivani – Hero Set
     Battlecrest: Rin Mana – Hero Set



Battlecrest is a card-based tactical skirmish game for 2 players (1-4 with expansions). With perfect information, players must truly outwit their opponent to win.

Characters are composed of 6-card sets featuring a hero card, a health tracker, and action cards. Occasionally a minion or item will replace an action card. The map is built of 6 cards as well, with the cards randomly placed in a set pattern.

Players take turns maneuvering their characters around the dynamic, and often dangerous map while unleashing powerful attacks. As action cards are used they open up new possibilities and empower the character’s battlecrests. Build up to decisive strikes or refocus to get powers back. Every character has a unique set of actions and preferred tactics, so no two battles play the same.

—description from the publisher

How about some more heroes? With more heroes you can get a lot of variety out of your games. You can also play them in solo (either as or against them) and even play 3-4P team games.

The fifth expansion collection introduces two new Heroes, Dowdran and Thrasher. The undead Dowdran is a pyromaniac who just wants to watch the world burn — and with his hazard-generating Heat Wave ability, he can make that happen. Thrasher is a high-powered athlete who packs a big punch, using doubled crests to maximize her offense and defense.

It also includes a brand-new Imperator solo AI that can be used on its own or mixed with either (or both!) of the two previous Imperator expansions. Of course, it’s not just more of the same! Imperator III has its own unique playstyle, favoring caution and mobility over reckless offense. With cards that check for refocusing at the start of the turn, rather than doing it at the end, players must be shrewd if they want to catch this Imperator unprepared!

Includes:

     Dowdran Hero set and AI sheet (for solo play).
     Thrasher Hero set and AI sheet (for solo play).
     Imperator III solo expansion.



What is the mark of a true champion? Legendary heroes clash across the Neververse to find out.

Characters are composed of 6-card sets featuring a hero card, a health tracker, and action cards. Occasionally a minion or item will replace an action card.

The map is built of 6 cards as well, with the cards randomly placed in a set pattern.

Players take turns maneuvering their characters around the dynamic, and often dangerous map while unleashing powerful attacks. As action cards are used they open up new possibilities and empower the character’s battlecrests. Build up to decisive strikes or refocus to get powers back. Every character has a unique set of actions and preferred tactics, so no two battles play the same.

—description from the publisher

Deckay is an intense, post-apocalyptic card game of combat and strategy where players face off in thrilling battles. Play in factions or engage in an all-against-all free-for-all mode as you fight to eliminate your opponents and emerge as the ultimate survivor. The game combines fast-paced action with deep tactical decisions, making each match unique and unpredictable.

In Deckay, you’ll arm yourself with powerful weapons and essential equipment like medkits and gas masks to survive the relentless chaos. Tactic cards provide strategic advantages to outsmart your enemies, while action cards bring exciting and versatile tools for battle. Adapt your strategy as the game evolves, using everything at your disposal to stay one step ahead.

The game features 15 unique characters, each with their own special ability and distinct card-carrying capacity. Whether you choose a character skilled in crafting or one with unmatched combat prowess, your choice will shape your strategy. Material cards introduce an exciting element of resource management, allowing you to craft dirty bombs or other useful tools to tip the scales in your favor.

For those seeking an even greater challenge, Deckay includes a set of challenge cards that unlock the extreme mode. These cards introduce game-wide situations that affect all players, adding an unpredictable twist to the already chaotic battlefield. No two games are ever the same, as each match brings a fresh set of challenges and opportunities.

With its blend of action, strategy, and unique character abilities, Deckay delivers an exhilarating tabletop experience where every decision counts. Are you ready to dive into the mayhem and prove your dominance?

—description from the designer

boardgame: Crystallum: Conflict in the Far Future
description:
This PDF includes full army lists and special rules for:

     Federation of Columbia
     Vlast
     Atlantic Council
     Crystallum Horde
     Heralds Of The Apocalypse
     Pan Asian Corporate Alliance
     Kaiser Tribes
     Eastern Enclave Forces
     Voladorona Republic


The Gaddis Gaming GUARDS V2 rulebook is also required to play.

“But some of us awake in the night with strange phantasms of enchanted hills and gardens, of fountains that sing in the sun, of golden cliffs overhanging murmuring seas, of plains that stretch down to sleeping cities of bronze and stone, and of shadowy companies of heroes that ride caparisoned white horses along the edges of thick forests; and then we know that we have looked back through the ivory gates into that world of wonder which was ours before we were wise and unhappy.”

- H.P. Lovecraft

Season 6 is a full-fledged expansion for Cthulhu: Death May Die. Exploring the wondrous locations of Lovecraft’s Dream Cycle, this expansion brings brand-new game mechanics to Death May Die, including an 8-sided Dream Die and a set of ever-changing tiles, plus new Investigators, Monsters, Relics, nightmare-inducing (or maybe nightmare-induced!) Insanities, 6 new Episodes, and 1 new Elder One. No reason to pinch yourself, as this expansion is practically a dream come true… let’s just hope Investigators can survive it!

—description from the publisher

Omnigaea is a stylish card game by Oz Pearsall that combines fast game-play and deep strategy with phantasmagorical fantasy art! Players only need one deck of fifty cards to play with two players. At least ten four-sided dice are also required (not included).

From the fifty card main deck, each player is dealt nine cards at random to form their deck. Over the course of three rounds, players will play three cards from their deck (of their choice) to face off against their opponents cards. These cards represent dream like entities with gorgeous artwork that have a skill and difficulty value alongside a special ability.

Pick your attacking entity and target then subtract the difficulty of your opponents entity from your entities skill (minimum of 1). The resulting number is how many four-sided dice you roll and so long as none of those rolls are a "1", then your attack succeeds. Play continues until someone wins two out of the three rounds.

Survive the onslaught of Q.u.B.E.s and save your stranded spaceship!
In Space Qubes, you and your crew are stranded in space, aboard a damaged research ship in 2273, under attack by alien lifeforms called Q.u.B.E.s (Quantum Biological Entities). These acidic, qube-shaped creatures damage systems and push toward your vulnerable drive core. Your mission? Defend the ship, repair the critical communication system, and send a distress signal before it’s too late!

Gameplay Overview:

     Explore and Repair: Search rooms for spare part cards, weapons, and gadgets while repairing damage to keep the ship functional.
     Defend and Attack: Fight Q.u.B.E.s that spawn each turn. Damaged rooms increase the danger, escalating the challenge.
     Manage Resources: Balance health, oxygen, energy, and limited inventory space to survive and complete your objective.


Each round, players act cooperatively, using actions to move, search, fight, or repair, while Q.u.B.E.s spread, attack, and advance toward the drive core. If the drive core is destroyed, all players are knocked out, or Q.u.B.E.s overrun the ship, you lose. To win, repair the control room with the spare parts.

Fast-Paced, Modular Fun:
With unique characters, variable room setups, and escalating tension, every play-through offers a fresh challenge. Space Qubes is a compact 2-4 player game, perfect for families and casual gamers, delivering a light yet thrilling cooperative experience packed with dramatic moments and strategic decisions.

A.I. was used in creation of the prototype illustrations and artworks only. The final product will have NO A.I. generated imagery.

boardgame: Cthulhu: Death May Die – Exclusive Insanities
description: A set of 4 Crowdfunding Exclusive Insanities: Metamorphosis, Haunting Apparition, Leeches, and Bone Spikes.

boardgame: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. The Board Game: Monster Hunter
description:
Many regard the Monster Hunter with disbelief, thinking that he is just one more legend of the Zone, one of those lone wolves that do not serve anyone and do not bow to anyone. Some say that he took care of all the monsters that appeared when the Brain Scorcher was turned off. Others say he has superhuman abilities and that he can take down some of the most dangerous mutants with his hands down. Those who have seen him in action - or at least claim they have - swear that he is a force to be reckoned with. Surprisingly, there are few who say they have actually talked to him, and fewer still have heard any answer.

It is kinda weird to figure out that he is real and standing right next to you, isn't it?

This expansion adds a new character to the game.

boardgame: Operation Barbarossa: A WW2 Roll & Write Game
description:
The year is 1941. Germany, at the height of its power, launches Operation Barbarossa, the largest invasion in history, against the Soviet Union. The Wehrmacht pushes eastward in a brutal campaign to capture vast territories, destroy the Red Army, and bring the Soviet regime to its knees. Can you lead the Blitzkrieg to triumph, or will your forces be ground down by the Soviet resistance?

In Operation Barbarossa, every roll of the dice shapes the fate of your invasion. You'll allocate your precious resources to spearhead attacks, manage supply lines, and break through fortified Soviet defenses. Your advance must be swift and decisive, striking at key targets like Leningrad, Moscow, and the Kiev while adapting to the challenges of stretched supply lines and relentless counterattacks.

This solitaire Roll & Write wargame challenges you with tough decisions each round. The Soviet resistance will grow fiercer, winter will close in, and your resources will never be enough to sustain your momentum everywhere at once. You’ll need to prioritize your objectives, reinforce your divisions, and carefully balance aggression with resupplying to maintain the initiative.

With fast-paced dice allocation, resource management, and mounting pressure, every decision could mean the difference between victory and catastrophic failure.

—description from the designer

description: On the occasion of the 80th anniversary of D-Day, discover this free collection of 8 scenarios to live the D-Day theater of the Second World War. These 8 scenarios played in the finals of major tournaments, and are all opportunities to unleash the Allied forces and relive the fighting.

boardgame: Beyond Humanity: Astrominers – 5-6 Player Game Expansion
description: Expansion to basic Kickstarter pledge. Adds 2 more players. The more, the merrier! Welcome even more friends and family to the table at the next gathering.

The end is nigh! Only your fast actions and reactions will keep you safe from (disco) armageddon in this hilarious fast-action card game.

Race to jump ahead of other players and get rid of all your cards first, harnessing your inner ninja hamster to jump ahead of the rest, while responding quickest to the action cards. Only the fastest hamsters will survive!

Super quick to learn and irresistibly entertaining for adults, teens and kids alike, Ninja Hamster Apocalypse Disco is sure to have everyone exploding with laughter.

—description from the publisher

IronFlight is a perilous solo adventure of tiny proportions. You are a rogue robot on the run, recently escaped from a remote laboratory and seeking to repair an antiquated bomber, the IronFlight. You must collect valuable scrap, construct Oil Rigs to harvest from the land, repair the IronFlight, and attempt to take flight to flee this corroded wasteland for good. If you are unable to gather the necessary plane parts and reach max speed as you careen off the runway cliff's edge, you will plummet to your demise… Will you reach the necessary speed to fly to safety or plunge off the cliff, only to have your wreckage scavenged by the next hopeful runaway?

Be prepared to press your luck and scavenge for resources when exploring randomized playfield, craft small engines to harvest precious oil, and attempt to construct a make-shift plane to take off to lands beyond in this solo, mint tin adventure!

IronFlight takes place over 2 phases: Exploration and Escape. In the Exploration phase, players will be pressing their luck to explore randomized terrain tiles in search of scrap and plane parts. But beware, if you push your luck too far or take too many days to find the necessary resources, you will lose before reaching your chance to escape in phase 2. Players must balance the increasingly severity of the rust storm, threat of raider patrols, and limited amount of resources on a quickly dwindling timeline. In the Escape phase, phase 2, players will be navigating the hazards placed by the raiders in phase 1, manipulating a continual dice roll to slowly increase the speed of their plane by the end of the runway. If players are unable to reach max speed, they lose the game with the ability to carry over progress from previous rounds into their next game. If players do successfully construct a plane in phase 1 and reach max speed in phase 2 -- they win the game!

-description from designer

Pinball SEE SAW is a game designed to give you and the whole family many hours of exciting fun. Both Offense and Defense must be played at the same time.

OBJECT: As a game requiring speed, quick reflexes and coordination, the object of the game is to score 10 points while limiting your opponent to fewer points.

The game unit is constructed of 2 independent see saws (or chutes) with 2 tracks on each. One track holds a steel roller (or a glass marble) and the other track holds a capsule-shaped game piece known as a Tumbler. The Tumbler is weighted on one end inside of it, so that it will flip end-over-end when the chute is lifted up. Each marble/roller track has a spring-loaded pinball plunger on either end (4 in total, 2 on each end).

SETUP: Each player faces one end of the game unit. In the chute on each player's left, place one steel roller in the left track and one Tumbler in the right track with the chute tilted down toward you. The left chute is your Offensive position, while the right chute is your Defensive position.

GAMEPLAY: The game starts when both players are ready to "Go". Start play by pulling the left-hand plunger back and releasing. This sends the roller to the opposite end of the track tilting the track so the Tumbler "walks" end-over-end toward the Scoring Territory of your opponent. When the Tumbler reaches the Scoring Territory, you score a point on your score board.

In the meantime, your opponent is trying to "walk" his Tumbler into your Scoring Territory. When his roller reaches your end of the right-hand chute, send it back to their end of the track with your right-hand plunger.

A unique feature of Pin Ball See Saw is the Offensive and Defensive play required of both players at the same time. Speed and coordination will develop as the game is played.

Two Tumblers have been supplied for each player. Change Tumblers when action is stopped to confuse your opponent, as the speed of each will vary.

Can be played with 4 players. Divide the Offensive and Defensive sides of each end between 2 players for a faster, more exciting game.

The Kickstarter edition (the Captain and Admiral Editions) contains the base game and the expansion, Revenant: Reason and Faith which will not come with the retail edition.

This expansion comes with two additional modules that can be added to the core game, together or individually.

Reason Module: In this module, a new type of ship joins the fleet: the Science Vessel. Use it to research and understand the galaxy-devouring Voidborn and its Corruption, discovering unique new technologies by peeing into the Void. Science vessels offer and alternative use for Discovery Data, and if you are willing to expose yourself to corruption, you can gain powerful permanent abilities in return, affecting more than just your Frigate.

Faith Module: The Houses joined forces to save the Revenant, but that does not mean that they have united in their beliefs. In the Faith module, a Paradigm card is revealed each round, dividing the Houses: three Houses support one outcome, three support the other, and one remains neutral on the issue. Each time a player uses a House ship, they are also supporting them in the debate, moving the Balance marker on the Paradigm card in the appropriate direction. At the end of the round, the winning Paradigm is resolved, either as an immediate effect, or as an ongoing modifier affecting the next round.

Name That Headliner contains 102 crazy concert lineups from history going from the 60s through the 2010s. Each player is presented with where and when the concert was and all the openers. Their job is to guess who the headliner is. The twist? The guesser gets unlimited guesses.

Name That Headliner is equal parts guessing, equal parts discovering. All of the concerts have been curated to include recognizable headliners and openers and the rules are structured to allow people with all levels of music knowledge have fun playing. Even though players guess one at a time, the rest of the players stay involved by giving hints. Sometimes it may feel like band charades!

Everyone goes through three rounds of guessing. At the end, each player compiles their own three act lineup based on the artists on the cards. Once everyone presents their three act lineup in true concert promoter fashion, everyone closes their eyes and votes on which concert they'd like to go to the most. That person wins!

—description from the designer

boardgame: 白と黒でトリテ　見えない数字 (Trick-Taking in Black and White, Hidden Numbers)
description:
A trick game where you predict invisible numbers and work together to complete a task.

This is a cooperative trick-taking game.
Each player plays one card from their hand of nine cards, and plays a total of nine times.
You win if you can adjust the number of wins for everyone according to the theme card.

However, only half of the numbers are written on the cards.
The numbers on cards that are upside down are hidden.
Do you put out the cards with invisible numbers early, or do you narrow them down and then put them out?
Use the cards with visible numbers and the cards with invisible numbers wisely to complete the task.

In this exciting trick taking game, players bid against each other to win Le Food cards. The player with the most Le Food points at the end of the game wins!

Each round, players decide what to bid. The highest bid wins Le Food. But, if there is a tie, the next highest bid wins! Each bidding card can only be played once per round. There are also special Le Bonus cards that can  turn defeat into triumphant victory!

The best strategy is not always bidding high every. What will the other players bid? What should you bid? French Goats in Trench Coats is a fun and fast playing game where you must outwit your opponents to outbid them!

—description from the publisher

Fans of the classic sitcom Seinfeld will love playing this themed UNO card game. With a deck featuring graphics inspired by favorite characters and scenes, players try to match colors and numbers -- there are even eight special rules all based on favorite moments from the show! And when down to a last card, don't forget to yell 'UNO!' Makes a great gift for fans of Seinfeld and card game lovers ages 7 years old and up. Colors and decorations may vary.

UNO game players will love feature graphics inspired by characters from the TV show Seinfeld.
Game play matches the classic card game where players match colors and numbers to get rid of all their cards.

There are 8 special rules based on moments from the show, including 'Serenity Now!', Yadda-Yadda', 'It's Not You, It's Me' and more.

When down to one card, don't forget to yell 'UNO!'

Designed for 2 to 10 players ages 7 years and older, the collectible card game makes a great gift for fans of the TV show!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: カケルカケルカ 拡張同梱版 (Kakeruka Keruka)
description:
With support for more players and new effect cards, this expansion offers even more variety and excitement than before!

We are releasing both a Full Set version (including the expansion) and an Expansion-Only version (for those who already own the original).

Whether you missed out last time or are discovering this game now, take this opportunity to add it to your collection!

Available at " I - eleven Kuroneko Loop " Please take care not to mistake the “L” for an “I"!

Pirmoji pagalba ("First aid") is an educational card game, designed to remind and reinforce first aid knowledge. Players immerse themselves in to the realistic situations/scenarios, have to put together the correct sequence of reactions, choose the most appropriate actions and means to help the casualty.

Nachsitzen ("Detention") offers you 8 new challenges - the best thing: the ideas come from enthusiastic ninja fans! New group and duel tasks await! Daring climbing, wobbly stacking and building, catapulting and flying - this time even more varied and challenging! Face the new ones Tasks, improve your ninja skills and have lots of fun with your friends.

The card ideas come from:


     Thomas Hög
     Robert Heller
     Susanne Streubel
     Axel Streubel
     Anna-Lena Rau
     Dennis Michel
     Osgor
     Geekpunkt


—description from the designer

boardgame: Tales of the Arabian Nights: Solo-Only Content Pack
description:
This expansion adds content to past editions of the game to play solitaire. A copy of any pre-2025 edition of Tales of the Arabian Nights (West End or Z-Man) is needed to play.

Includes:
Softcover Solo Book of Tales containing solo rules and quest tales
50+ cards (Quest, Treasure, Status) - Card backs match the cards from Tales of the Arabian Nights: 40th Anniversary and will not match the cards from earlier editions of  Tales of the Arabian Nights.
Punchboard Milestone markers.

boardgame: Tales of the Arabian Nights: Changes-Only Update Pack
description: This expansion adds the new multiplayer content from Tales of the Arabian Nights: 40th Anniversary to previous (pre-2025) West End and Z-man editions of the game.

In Club Sandwich, each player manages a food truck and must prepare the tastiest sandwiches to attract customers. Draw ingredient cards and use them to create new layers in the common sandwiches shared by all players. Remember the ingredients of the sandwiches, place your napkin to claim the best sandwich for your recipe, and add terrible ingredients to the others to make your opponents lose customers.
Conquer more customers to win the food truck challenge.

In Club Sandwich, ogni giocatore gestisce un food truck e deve preparare i panini più gustosi per attirare i clienti. Pesca le carte ingrediente e usale per creare nuovi strati nei panini comuni a tutti i giocatori. Ricorda gli ingredienti dei sandwich, posiziona il tuo tovagliolo per accaparrarti il panino migliore per la tua ricetta e aggiungi pessimi ingredienti negli altri per far perdere clienti agli avversari.
Conquista più clienti per vincere la sfida dei food truck.

boardgame: Escape Box: Rick et Morty – Panique dans le Minivers
description:
Can you help Morty rescue Rick from the Minivers? You've got 60 minutes to solve the riddles, buuuurp!

Off with Summer to find the best ice cream in the galaxy, Rick finds himself trapped in the Minivers, prisoner of Zeep, a deranged scientist. In extremis, he manages to leave Morty a message: he has 60 minutes to get him out, and not a minute more! Time is running out, and you've got to help Morty solve the riddles to save Rick!

--

Un Escape Game... très schwifty !
Saurez-vous aider Morty à sortir Rick du Minivers ? Vous avez 60 minutes pour résoudre les énigmes, buuuurp !

Parti avec Summer chercher les meilleures glaces de la galaxie, Rick se retrouve coincé dans le Minivers, prisonnier de Zeep, un scientifique bien dérangé. Il arrive in extremis à laisser un message à Morty : il a 60 minutes pour le faire sortir de là, et pas une de plus ! Le temps presse, il vous faut aider Morty à résoudre les énigmes pour sauver Rick !

Inclus : un poster et une bande-son d'une heure pour vous immerger totalement dans l'ambiance déjantée de Rick et Morty !

Eight extra gears with new abilities to gear up your game of Gutenberg.

Included in the game Printing Press which has the same setting as Gutenberg.

boardgame: Fast Track: The Speed Reaction Card Game
description:
Get ready for heart-pounding action and lightning-fast fun with Fast Track - the thrilling speed reaction card game designed for 2-8 players!

Step into the vibrant world of London with Fast Track. Match quintessentially British icons, London Landmarks, and Transport for London lines as you race against your friends and family to be the quickest on the draw.

Flip over a 'Go To' card and let the adrenaline flow! With everyone playing at the same time, speed is essential to victory. Can you keep your cool and spot the matches before anyone else?

Fast Track offers not just one, but two thrilling game modes to keep the excitement going! In "All Stations," be the first player to shed all your cards by matching them to the current 'Go To' Card. In "Route Planner," strategize and collect the most cards before the deck runs out!

As an officially licensed Transport for London product, Fast Track brings the essence of every journey matters to your gaming table. Immerse yourself in the world of TfL while having an absolute blast with your friends and family!

Get your Fast Track game today and experience the rush of adrenaline, quick thinking, and heartwarming moments of victory! Every second counts - are you up for the challenge?

—description from the publisher

Each player starts with some money and shares according to his character card assigned. In the beginning of each trading day, a drawn event card shows the movement of the whole market. A die determines the extend (1 to 3 rows). Then the market goes up or down 3 rows if the stock index is below or above 23,000. On your turn, you may trade up to 10 shares. For each share, pay a fix trading fee. After as many trading days as players participate, in the middle of the next trading day all players collect their dividend according to the market for each share. Richest player wins.

boardgame: Mystery Riddles: Adventskalender – Der magische Wald
description:
Puzzle your way from room to room in the enchanted forest of Kpheon.

On one of your forays, you discover a glowing portal and curiously step through it. Suddenly, a supernatural force hurls you through a sparkling green tunnel and shortly afterwards you find yourself at the edge of an impressive forest.

You are still confused when you hear a scratchy voice from below: ‘Hello, friend, welcome to the magical forest of Kpheon! You look at me in amazement, as if you've never had a conversation with a magical tree fennec before.’ ...

... What luck! With a magical friend by your side, the search for the portal that can take you back to your world will certainly be a lot easier. But where has the little chap suddenly gone? With a few brave leaps, you follow the tree fennec with his purple striped tail into the forest...

—description from the box (translated)

Rätsele dich von Raum zu Raum im Zauberwald Kpheon.

Auf einem deiner Streifzüge entdeckst du ein leuchtendes Portal und trittst neugierig hindurch. Plötzlich wirst du von einer übernatürlichen Kraft durch einen grün funkelnden Tunnel geschleudert und stehst kurz darauf am Rand eines beeindruckenden Waldes.

Du bist noch ganz durcheinander, als du von unten eine kratzige Stimme hörst: "Hallo, Freundling, willkommen im Zauberwald Kpheon! Du siehst mich so erstaunt an, als hättest du dich noch nie mit einem magischen Baumfennek unterhalten." ...

... Was für ein Glück! Mit einem magischen Freund an deiner Seite wird die Suche nach dem Portal, das dich zurück in deine Welt bringen kann, bestimmt sehr viel leichter. Aber wo ist der kleine Kerl plötzlich hin? Mit ein paar beherzten Sprüngen folgst du dem Baumfennek mitseime lila gestreiften Schwanz in den Wald...

—description from the box
family: Misc: Advent / Christmas / Jule calendar game

description:
Jockey for position and build momentum as you sled downhill, moving from card to card dodging rocks and walls as you race for towards the finish at the bottom of the deck. Manage your hand to play out a perfect maneuver to pass your opponent, or stash your cards as a plot to go off the moment they try to take the lead. Do you go rail to rail and knock your opponent out of position, or keep your distance to maintain your speed? Dig your our trail through the powder in this duel of bluffs on the bluffs.

—description from the designer

Santa Sumo is a 2-player microgame in postcard format. The postcard includes punch-out components: 2x Santa figures, 2x "1-cent" tokens, 2x "2-cent" tokens, and 2x score trackers.

Players compete in a sumo tournament for a work-free Christmas at the beach, using simultaneous action programming.

Each round, both players secretly plan two movement actions by marking their chosen spaces with the "1-cent" and "2-cent" tokens. The starting player first executes their "1-cent" action, moving their Santa to the selected space. The other player then executes their "1-cent" action. The process repeats for the "2-cent" actions in the same order.

If a Santa moves into a space occupied by the opponent's Santa, the opponent is pushed one space toward the ring's edge. If the opponent is already on an edge space, they are forced out of the ring, and the pushing player wins the match. The first player to win 3 matches wins the tournament.

—description from the designer

Card game with fire beasts and gangs of devils from all over Catalonia. Players start without cards in their hands and acquire them turn after turn. They can build their correfoc with the cards they get and prevent the rest from doing so. The first person to make a correfoc with ten elements (devils or beasts) wins.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Joc de cartes amb bèsties de foc i colles de diables d'arreu de Catalunya. Els jugadors comencen sense cartes a les mans i les van adquirint torn rere torn. Amb les cartes que aconsegueixen poden construir el seu propi correfoc i impedir que la resta ho facin. Guanya la primera persona que aconsegueix fer un correfoc amb deu elements (diables o bèsties).

—description from the publisher

Gremios is a thrilling medieval-themed game for 2 to 4 players, where you’ll race to become the city's most influential figure. Along the way, you'll need to outsmart your rivals by investing in powerful guilds, cultivating lands, building inns, and braving treacherous seas in search of hidden treasures.

Step into the shoes of a randomly assigned character, each boasting two unique abilities and strategies that shape your path to victory.

As the game unfolds, new guilds appear, and the dynamic mix of roles and strategies creates endless possibilities, ensuring limitless replayability.

Simple to learn yet rich in strategy, Gremios caters to both newcomers and seasoned players seeking a fresh challenge. Will you rise to claim the throne of influence—all in just 30 minutes?

—description from the publisher

Two teams of 4 medieval warriors fight a skirmish on a hex-grid map. The 4 warriors of a team are equiped by :

     bow + sword
     axe + sword
     sword + shield
     pique + shield


4 red hexes are set on the map at the beginning : they block movement and line of sight, and 4 blue hexes : they block movement only.
Movement is free (1 or 2 hexes), but attacks and defenses are driven by cards that you should play on warriors equiped with the weapon or shield shown on the card. If not, the card is ignored (you can bluff if you don't have the good cards in hand or want to keep them for later). There are cards for dodging too. The bow attacks up to 3 hexes, for the other 3 weapons you must be adjacent.
Warriors are oriented towards a side of the hex, so the 3 front and the 3 back hexes are important for attacks and defenses.
12 rounds where the first player is determined by a deck of initiative cards.
The players have the same 12 combat cards in hand at the beginning.
A round :

     draw an initiative card to see who are 1st and 2nd players
     players draw a combat card (sword, pike, axe, bow, shield or dodge)
     movement phase of 1st player : move 0-4 warriors
     movement phase of 2nd player : move 0-4 warriors not adjacent to enemies at the beginning
     attack phase of 1st player : orientation, distance and line of sight count
     attack phase of 2nd player : idem


After 12 rounds you score :

     10 VP for each of your warriors still alive
     20 VP if you have one warrior on your opponent's hex base
     1 VP for each offensive combat card in hand
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
A vertical word search game using your own Scrabble or Bananagram tiles. The vertical board consists of ten columns set inside a clear acrylic front. Each column has nine rows into which tiles are dropped.

COMPONENTS:

     Lasercut 8x9-inch vertical board with a clear acrylic front.
     Two D6 dice and one D10 die.
     Dry erase score trackers
     Optionally, a set of two-sided letter tiles.


SETUP:
Assemble the board. Grab your bag of wooden Scrabble or Bananagram tiles and empty them face down behind the board as the draw pile. Decide whether to use six columns or all ten columns. Decide upon a target winning score, for example 150 points.

Players drop tiles into the board to fill it to the top within the designated rows, either 1-6 or 1-10 (0).

GAME PLAY:
Players take turns as follows:

     Roll the die/dice to select a column. 
     From the front of the board, push out the bottom tile, letting the column of tiles drop.
     Grab a tile from the draw pile and place it at the top of the column


Now all players have 30 seconds to search for words they spot in any of eight directions: left to right, right to left, top to bottom, bottom to top and four ways diagonally.
Players call out their word(s), write the word on their individual score trackers and record the value of the word.

Words must be unique, i.e. if already recorded, cannot be used again.

Repeat the game play until someone reaches the target score to be declared the winner.

NOTES:
To level the field for younger players, the youngest children need only form 3- and 4-letter words for double the points.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Die drei ???: Stadt – Land – Rocky Beach
description: Town, country, Rocky Beach! The popular town-country-river game principle with 21 entertaining and challenging categories that match the world of "The Three Investigators". Score points with your knowledge of detective characteristics, crime scenes and gadgets. Real fan knowledge of the three detectives is rewarded twice. The cool game block with the detectives Justus, Peter and Bob ensures exciting and creative guessing fun for children aged 8 and over.
Contains 50 cards with 100 music trivia questions and full instructions. The goal of the game is to be the first to answer 5 quiz questions correctly.

Chaos comes to Christmas this year, with elves needing to catch reindeer and find lost presents. The game is played over ten rounds, cards drawn from a standard card deck are used to keep track, the suit determining which present (ornament, candy cane, bell, or toy) provides bonus points that turn. Two dice are rolled, one for movement, the other for how many squares on the map one can cross off, the goal being to encircle the most reindeer and collect the most presents to achieve the highest score.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Gundam G-Generation Digiboard Mission: Expansion set A
description: This expansion adds five new pieces to the game.

boardgame: Gundam G-Generation Digiboard Mission: Expansion set B
description: This is an expansion that adds five new units to the game.

boardgame: Gundam G-Generation Digiboard Mission: Expansion set C
description: This expansion adds five new units to the game.

boardgame: Gundam G-Generation Digiboard Mission: Expansion set D
description: This expansion adds five new units to the game.

boardgame: Gundam G-Generation Digiboard Mission: Expansion set E
description: This expansion adds five new units to the game.

boardgame: Gundam G-Generation Digiboard Mission: Expansion set F
description: This expansion adds five new units to your game.
A ten-card expansion that allows for a fifth and sixth player, it adds a new pirate, event, two tools, four tasks, and two items.

Introduction:Slicron (from Scottish Gaelic: slighean a' crìonadh, meaning "shrinking paths") is a drawless self-stalemate game for two players: Black and White. It is played on the hexes (cells) of an initially empty hexagonal board. The recommended board size is 5 cells per side, but boards of 4 and 6 are also valid. Each player has access to a sufficient supply of stones of their own color.

				
				
					Definitions:
     A group is a maximal set of stones of the same color connected to each other. A single stone is also a group.
     The path of a group is a minimally connected subgroup containing two stones on the edge. A group can contain multiple paths as long as each of them is the minimal path between two edge stones. If the group does not contain two stones on the edge, it has no path.
     A surplus stone is a stone within a group that is not part of a path.
     The length of a path is the number of stones it contains.


				
				
					Turns:Black plays first and then turns alternate. On your turn, perform the following actions in the order listed:


     Place a stone of your color on an empty cell. 
     Remove from the board all surplus stones from the group of the placed stone if, by doing so, it forms a new path of your choice among the possible paths in the group.


If the placed stone is adjacent to one or more friendly groups with paths and forms a new path, it must be shorter than all of those paths; otherwise, the placement is illegal.

				
				
					End of the game:The player who places the last stone wins.

To balance the game, before starting, the first player places a black stone on an empty cell and the second player chooses a side. This balancing method is called the pie rule.

—description from the designer

Prepare for an exhilarating ice-cold adventure with a board game designed to entertain your family for hours. Experience the authentic chill of real ice as you navigate the board, striving to reach your icy home before your fellow players. On this frosty journey, you’ll encounter perilous challenges and face icy dangers. Will you be the first to reach safety and claim the key to victory? The ultimate icy challenge awaits—join us to uncover who will emerge triumphant!

Set in a winter land, Cayo has players rolling dice, battling each other with cards, collecting tools, riding a dragon, and dodging mines to cooperatively build the central igloo from actual frozen blocks, then race to become the first player to make it inside.

—description from the publisher

Vili & Vé (Odin's brothers) change the initial setup. You start the game with only 2 vikings instead of 3. Their special ability allows to move both your vikings on the same turn without summoning runestones. Also at the end of the turn you can swap positions of one of your vikings and adjacent viking of your opponent.

Modi (Thor's son and god of battle rage) special ability is as follows: if you move your viking exactly one step and opponent's viking stands on the direction of your way - you can eliminate him by removing from the board for the rest of the game.

Adaptation of the Hail Caesar rules for naval battles in the Ancient World.

Hail, Agrippa! simulates the big battles of antiquity. Players are admirals commanding several hundred ships.

Distance are for 1/2400 but other scales can be used 1/200 1/600 1/3600
Both fleet should be based in a similar way.

It also includes 2 campaigns: Massilia 49BC and the Battle of Actium in 31BC

The rules were published in Wargames - Soldiers & Strategy #66 and are available for free on their website.

boardgame: 軌跡 Trading Card Game (Kiseki Trading Card Game)
description:
Translate by google:
The Kiseki Trading Card Game is a competitive trading card game featuring characters from the Kiseki series. In Lightning Shield, each player prepares five card packs and enjoys battling, and in Strategy, players collect their favorite cards and build a deck.
Let's actually play the game.
Choose one of the two play styles below and build a deck that suits it.
1.
Play with 40 cards and 5 opened Kiseki TCG booster packs.
Easy to play even for beginners.
■Deck rules
Use 40 cards divided into 5 packs. Other cards cannot be inserted.
A deck can contain any number of cards with the same name and subname.
2.
Create an original deck by combining the Kiseki TCG cards you have collected and play against each other.
■Deck rules
A deck contains exactly 50 cards.
A deck can contain up to 4 cards with the same name and subname.

Victory Conditions:
All players start the game with 40 bond points, but if they take damage during the game, they will lose bond points equal to that amount.
The upper limit of bond points is 40, but there is no lower limit - it can be less than 0 points.
If a player's bond falls below 0 points during the game, the game will continue until the end of the round.
You win if your opponent's bond is 0 or less at the end of the round.
If each player's bond is 0 or less, their bonds are compared and the player with the most bonds wins the game.

From official website:
軌跡TRADING CARD GAMEとは、軌跡シリーズのキャラクターが登場する対戦型トレーディングカードゲームです。プレイヤーがそれぞれ5パック用意して遊ぶブリッツシールド戦や、好きなカードを集めてデッキを作って遊ぶストラテジー戦で対戦を楽しみましょう。
実際にゲームを遊んでみましょう。
以下の2つの遊び方の内1つを選び、それに合わせたデッキを構築します。
1.
軌跡TCGのブースターパックを5パック分開封した40枚ちょうどのデッキで対戦します。
初心者でも手軽に遊ぶことができます。
■デッキのルール
5パック分を開封した40枚のカードをそのまま使います。他のカードを入れることはできません。
同じ名前かつ同じサブ名のカードがデッキに何枚入っていてもかまいません。
2.
集めた軌跡TCGのカードで構築したオリジナルのデッキで対戦します。
■デッキのルール
デッキのカード枚数は50枚ちょうどです。
同じ名前かつ同じサブ名のカードはデッキに4枚まで入れることができます。

勝利條件:
プレ イヤーはお互いに40 点の絆を持ってゲームを開始し、ゲーム中にダメージを受けるとその数値に等しい点数だけ絆を失います。
絆の上限は40点で、下限はなく0点を下回ることがあります。
ゲーム中どちらかのプレイヤーの絆が0点以下になった場合でも、進行中のターンが終了するまでゲームを続けます。
ターン終了時に相手の絆が0 点以下ならあなたはゲームに勝利します。
もしお互いの絆が0点以下だった場合、お互いの絆を比較し、絆が多いプレイヤーがゲームに勝利します。

INTRODUCTION
Bounce is a two-player game played on a square board of any even size. The board is initially filled with a checkerboard pattern of red and blue checkers, except the corner squares, which are unoccupied.

GROUP
A group here is a monocolored, orthogonally interconnected group of checkers.

OBJECT
If, at the conclusion of your turn, all of your checkers are in one group, you win.

PLAY
Starting with Red, players take turns moving one of their checkers to an unoccupied square (if they have a legal move available. The checker you move must be part of a larger group after your move than it was before your move.

CHECKER REMOVAL
If you don't have any legal moves available on your turn, you must instead remove any one of your checkers from the board, concluding your turn.

New railway is coming to your cities! As governors of your town, your goal is to have the most awesome view for passengers. While creating the best view on your side, you also have to balance it well with the other side. Too wonderful is a fraud!

In this 9-Card card game, you are trying to have the most scoring points without having much gap in points between you and your opponent. You draw a card each turn and place it with either Cityscape side (doing this three times) or Scoring side face up (do exactly one time). After all cards are placed, you will get points based on what appears on your side. Player with the highest points wins.. unless the gap between both players is higher than 5 points which will cause a player with lower points to win instead!

—description from the designer
Heidrún (a goat from Valhalla) special ability is as follows: if you create a region during your turn you can at the end of your turn move one of the opponent's nomad vikings and summon a runestone.

boardgame: Mister Torgue's Arena of Badassery: Flesh-Stick Scenario
description:
The great tragedy of revenge isn't that its an ultimately hollow aspiration that curses your soul if you succeed in your obsession. No, the great tragedy is that you can only do it once! But thanks to a hacked New-U...

—description from the publisher

Here you go Vault Hunters, a new 3-scenario mini series featuring Flesh-Stick.

This digital campaign in an addition one to the game's and the Loot-Splosion... Go ahead, grab your favorite Vault Hunters and get hunting!

boardgame: Borderlands: Mister Torgue's Arena of Badassery – Movie Magic Scenario
description:
The cast is assembled, the stage is set, and it’s time to make some movie magic! Welcome back Vault Hunters for this special premiere event of carnage and mayhem. Everybody wants to be a star but the spotlight can only shine on one Vault Hunter at a time. Sharing the limelight might be the key to victory.

—description from the publisher

A new digital scenario from MFC for your pleasure/mayhem in addition to the game's campaign and the Loot-Splosion ones. This one scenario introduces "Spotlight Buff" where, if victorious, Vault Hunters (VH) get to keep one of their Spotlight Buff cards to use in future games. VH keep the card during the entire game and may use its buff ability whenever they have the Spotlight.

So go ahead, grab your favorite VH and make some movie magic!

War Fields is an abstract strategy game with a light medieval theme. Lead your armies to victory by invading the enemy palace!

During the course of the game, players will take turns fielding and moving armies, constructing fortresses and harbours, conquering cities and attacking the opponent's units. No resource management is involved, as all actions spend Action Points, which are regenerated every turn, but can't be stored.

Combat is completely deterministic, leaving out every element of randomness. The only randomized part of the game is the setup, which determines the regions in play and the position of cities.

There is also an optional module called Cavalry, which introduces horseback units. Those can move farther, can go through enemy units and structures and are slightly stronger against smaller armies.

—description from the designer

Special tile printed for the Carcassonne World Record Córdoba 2024.
It shows the ruins of Medina Azahara, the splendorous califal city near Córdoba in times of Al-Andalus.
¡Nos jugamos!

You're a fan of eating shucos (guatemalan hot-dogs) and you must eat the best shucos in town. They're different types of shucos: plain, exotic flavors, all meats, veggie, etc.

The shucos are tiles that are prepared on the grill (the main board) and every type of shuco has a particular effect during the game. Depending the shuco you eat, you'll receive benefits from it (described on the player's board where all shuco tiles are placed).

The player who accumulates more points (eat the best combination of shucos) wins the game!

Vlad Tepes III is the messiah the people of the night have been waiting for millennia. He is the Chosen One who will wage war against the Light, driven by an iron will and unparalleled cruelty. His vengeance will fall upon all mortals and cause rivers of Blood to flow!

This rich expansion dedicated entirely to Blood's ultimate villain will add 3 new Bosses, a new game mode, and... the 5th player!

Attention, ladies and gentlemen! The great Vasile's Follies show has arrived in Transylvania! This time it will bring smiles and amazement not only to Bran, but to the other villages in the area! Gather around, a show every day... But always before sunset!

An expansion entirely dedicated to heroes, with 4 crazy Troupers and brand new mechanics for the Day Part, with more villages to travel between, new crafting rules, and hundreds of new opportunities!

From lands unknown and legendary, here are four new Vampire Hunters, come to Transylvania to put an end to the curse of Vlad and his bloodline. These valiant heroes have found great allies in the Troupers of Vasile's Folies, and share a common goal with them.

An expansion dedicated to legendary hunters: 4 new characters await you in this fantastic box! Viktor, Katia, Lama, and Michelle will join the fight: use their specific skills and abilities to recreate iconic scenes!

Will you dare to fight this monstrous creature? Nosferatu will be a tough opponent, you have to be smart and clever to banish him from the lands of Transilvania!

Nosferatu will utilize a unique shadow-based mechanic of which he is the absolute master. Until the Heroes can bring light to the battlefield, Nosferatu will be the deadliest opponent in the game!

You are a young astronomer that has been tasked to annotate the various constellations in the sky but… not knowing what a Cassiopeia or and Orion are, you decided to create your own!

In Stitch the Stars the players are competing against each other to be the first one to complete their celestial charts while working on their fine motor skills! There are various sizes of charts that require a different number of constellations to be completed.
Pen and paper, shoelace/yarn and plastic needle or embroidery. There is something for everyone and their fine motor skills. Just print them out and try it as much as you please!

Printable components:

- 3 Different sized Celestial Charts 
- 18 Pre-Drawn Constellation Cards 
- 9+ Blank Constellation Cards

Additional components:

- Pen or Pencil 
- 100cm Shoelace
- Plastic Needle + Yarn (at least 100cm but ideally 200cm)
- Embroidery Needle and Thread (at least 100cm)

—description from the designer

Set in the world of the comic "Un mes en Villacolmillo", this self-published game offers a simple pick-up and deliver family game.

Players take the role of "postal workers" for a day, trying to be the best of the village at it. They starts the game with 2 "shipment" cards, each of them with an "Origin" and a "Destination" locations (from the board), the victory points it awards if fulfilled, and maybe a special icon for end game scoring majories or to affect the movement while it's the "active shipping".

The players have 6 different characters to choose, each with a special ability.

During the game players take turns choosing one of two options:

     Get new shipment cards (either from the deck, or from an open draft offer if this action is chosen from the postal office location), with a hand limit of 5 cards.
     Roll the dice to move on the board, trying to get to the origin of one of his shipment card in hand, so it can be set as the "active shipping", and/or to the destination location of their current active shipping card, to fulfill it and move it to their "delivered packages" zone.


The game end triggers when a number of packages have been delivered at the end of a round, depending on player count (10 with 2 players, 15 with 3, and 20 with 4 players), then a full additional round is played, and the player with more points (from delivered packages, with special points awarded to players with most of some kind of packages delivered) wins.

boardgame: The Binding of Isaac: Four Souls Anniversary Booster Pack
description:
In honor of the 10th anniversary of The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth, the Anniversary Booster Pack is a celebration of all things Isaac, from Flash right up to the present day!

Featuring 20 exciting new cards, this booster pack not only supplements your Four Souls collection but takes you on a journey through each era of Isaac's story.

—description from the publisher

After following the star fairy, you were trapped in a maze dungeon. Escape the ever-changing maze through the magic portal!
Turn the card over and move it around in your hand to connect the maze from the dungeon entrance to the magic portal!

Each player has 9 cards in their hand.
Decide which quest to do on the quest card and create a maze route to complete that quest first.
Once the route is complete, shout "Handmaze" and everyone checks that player's hand.
If it is correct, the player get 1 point. If it is wrong, that player is eliminated from this round. (The first to score 3 points wins!)
Both hands can be used while creating a route, but once the route is completed, all cards must be in one hand.

Success is achieved only when the paths are connected.
However, due to small hands or agreement between players, only part of the process may be completed and recognized as a success. (Easy mode, etc.)
The roads do not have to be connected, but the paths must be connected.
Icons required for quests must not be obscured.

The player should also keep any remaining cards in your hand that are not used in the quest. Do not place it on the table.

It should be placed so that can also see the quests progressing.

—description from the designer

boardgame: Northern Branch: Firm With Brownies Fest Box
description:
Players play as the merchants of the Northern City and expand their business while working together with their partner Brownies and conference union to set up the Spring Festival! Go ahead and win the contest with Brownies!

The basic set comes with the Merchant Contest expansion (13 cards) and a special box that can store all 3 Brownies game boxes (Firm with Brownies, Northern Branch: Firm with Brownies and Frontier with Brownies).

Northern Branch: Firm With Brownies is required to play the Merchant Contest expansion.

CNUNO is a game similar to UNO. Players race to empty their hands. In turns, players attempt to play a card by matching its color, number to the topmost card on the discard pile. If unable to play, players draw a card from the draw pile and pass their turn. The special cards can spice things up a bit. The rules are similar, but when you have only 1 card left you yell SORRY instead of UNO.

Additionally, while Uno cards come in various designs, Cnuno cards usually follow a specific design that aligns with local themes and traditions.

In the town of Ironcliff, the cathedral of the town rose like a beacon, spires tower over the city piercing the sky. Its walls stood strong, but the windows are bare, waiting for the artistry of the master craftsman. The King announced that every artisan in the city is ordered to create the stained glass that will be put in the windows of the cathedral. The Master that creates the most beautiful stained glass windows not only will be rewarded their weight in gold but will be also announced the master of artisans and their accomplishments will be known across the land.

Cathedroll is a roll & write game where you are tasked with creating stained glass windows that will be placed into the Cathedral of Ironcliff. Beauty of the window is not the only thing you’ll need to worry about but also the speed because other artisans will try to create their order before you.

—description from the publisher

Have you ever thought about leaving everything behind? Grabbing a small bag with essentials and leaving the noise of the town, exploring the world and everything it has to offer? Travel across different countries and see the beauty of the landscape often taken for granted. Pick up a bundle and create your own path.

The Wayfarer is a roll & write game where you will travel throughout various countries, visiting different types of terrain.  Note every place you visit and create a travel journal of a true wayfarer.

—description from the publisher

Doctor Moritz is trying to escape yet again! Spy Guy is already on his trail, though. Join the world’s best super detective, look for clues, and catch Doctor Moritz before he disappears into thin air!
Spy Guy: Card Game is a quick game of observation, where you join forces to apprehend Doctor Moritz. Your task is to find a clue that two given cards have in common. The more clues you find, the better your chance of catching the villain.

—description from the publisher

In Spy Guy Paw Patrol you help Chase and his team find the Mayor Humdinger who took all the sweaters from the residents of Adventure Bay to make the world’s largest ball of yarn for his cats. Find on the map as many clues as possible, which will help you find the devious Mayor before he escapes into Foggy Bottom. Spy Guy is a cooperative game that tests your observation skills and collaboration between players. On the board of Adventure Bay look for clues, which would bring you closer to find the Mayor Humdinger. If you manage to catch up to the Mayor you win the game!

—description from the publisher

W Spy Guy Psi Patrol pomagasz Chase'owi i jego zespołowi znaleźć burmistrza Humdingera, który zabrał wszystkie swetry mieszkańcom Zatoki Przygód, aby zrobić największy na świecie kłębek włóczki dla swoich kotów. Znajdź na mapie jak najwięcej poszlak, które pomogą Ci znaleźć przebiegłego Burmistrza, zanim ucieknie do Mglistej Osady. Spy Guy to gra kooperacyjna, która sprawdza Twoje umiejętności obserwacji i współpracę między graczami. Na planszy Zatoki Przygód szukaj poszlak, które przybliżą Cię do odnalezienia burmistrza Humdingera. Jeśli uda Ci się go dogonić, wygrywasz grę!

—description from the publisher (Polish)
